message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "protection": "Clear definition of acceptance criteria and remedies for failure to meet them",
      "why_missing": "The contract lacks specific acceptance criteria and remedies for failure to meet those criteria, which could lead to disputes over whether the software meets the agreed standards.",
      "risk": "Without clear acceptance criteria, the Company may be unable to reject subpar software, leading to potential financial losses and operational issues.",
      "mitigation": "Include detailed acceptance criteria and specify remedies for failure to meet those criteria, such as rework or penalties.",
      "suggested_clause": "The acceptance criteria for the software shall be clearly defined in Annex II. If the software fails to meet these criteria, Developer shall be required to remedy the failure at no additional cost to Company within [insert number] days.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.4",
      "source_clause_id": "77912e9c-8858-4762-93f9-92bc1f63dbcb",
      "source_excerpt": "Upon approval of the programming specifications, Developer design, in conjunction with Company, an Acceptance test for these specifications. The Acceptance test will follow those standards listed in Annex II.",
      "confidence": 0.9
    },
    {
      "protection": "Defined timeline for acceptance testing and feedback",
      "why_missing": "The contract does not specify a timeline for the Company to conduct acceptance testing and provide feedback, which could delay project timelines.",
      "risk": "Delays in acceptance testing could lead to extended project timelines and increased costs, as well as potential disputes over delivery dates.",
      "mitigation": "Establish a clear timeline for acceptance testing and feedback to ensure timely project completion.",
      "suggested_clause": "Company shall complete acceptance testing within [insert number] days of delivery and provide feedback to Developer within [insert number] days thereafter.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.10",
      "source_clause_id": "88ba66e2-413e-4fbf-808e-94d9d8ea7efd",
      "source_excerpt": "Upon delivery, Company shall conduct the acceptance test that was created by the parties.",
      "confidence": 0.85
    },
    {
      "protection": "Consequences for delays in delivery by Developer",
      "why_missing": "The contract mentions cancellation as a remedy for delays but does not specify other potential consequences or penalties for the Developer.",
      "risk": "Without clear consequences, the Developer may not be incentivized to meet deadlines, leading to project delays and increased costs for the Company.",
      "mitigation": "Include penalties for delays, such as financial penalties or reduced payments for late delivery.",
      "suggested_clause": "In the event that Developer fails to deliver the completed programs within the specified timeframe, Developer shall incur a penalty of [insert percentage]% of the total Phase price for each week of delay.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.9",
      "source_clause_id": "fbca1200-9bae-4a0a-8990-7b76afcf59c1",
      "source_excerpt": "In the event that Developer fails to deliver the completed programs ………..[insert number] months after the original delivery date, and the delivery date was not modified, Company may cancel that Phase Agreement.",
      "confidence": 0.8
    }
  ]
}
